name: auris
description: Auris monorepo — API-first study-audio engine, WhatsApp demo client, React admin, and MCP server.

scripts.test: npm test --prefix auris/engine && npm test --prefix auris/whatsapp && npm test --prefix auris/admin && npm test --prefix auris/mcp
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix auris/engine && npm run typecheck --prefix auris/whatsapp && npm run typecheck --prefix auris/admin && npm run typecheck --prefix auris/mcp
